name: high_vol_50d
description: 50 days of higher-amplitude alternating returns; still smaller than neighbor_k so argpartition is NOT used. Pins the standard MC path with PCT_SCALAR conversions and Euclidean nearest-neighbor distance.
derivation: Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD 7ff61a4 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=42). The value shifted from the pre-Cluster-2 51.5 because AC-1 standardizes the kNN feature vector and AC-4 excludes the first MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS-1 early-window days from the candidate pool — both intentionally change which regime neighbours are selected. Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer (the corrected behaviour is the new spec). The 5000-path count gives a clean 2-decimal value (below_count is integer; n/5000*100).
